title: The One Job AI Can't Replace, According to @3blue1brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviewed 3Blue1Brown about AI's limitations in the job market. The discussion identifies at least one type of work that AI is not expected to displace, reflecting on the boundaries of AI capability.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews 3Blue1Brown on where AI's reach in the job market stops. The conversation identifies at least one category of work that AI is not expected to displace, using it to mark the boundaries of current AI capability. The takeaway is a concrete claim about the limits of automation rather than a broad forecast of disruption.
